locked_holdout.purpose: Final out-of-sample evaluation under Kelly sizing-only and top_k=2 policy. Do not tune models, thresholds, or top_k using this window.
locked_holdout.reset_reason: Production top_k changed from 4 to 2 after pre-holdout ablation; prior observations and the 2026-07-20 forecast are not comparable.

component_calibration.reason: All-component calibration produced zero exposure and worse Top-4 ranking on the 365-day walk-forward benchmark.

constrained_stacking.reason: On the 730-day walk-forward benchmark, stacking matched uniform fusion on Top-4 hits and ranking ROI, with CI95 including zero and permutation p=0.2993.

uniform_fusion.reason: On the same 730-day walk-forward window, uniform fusion increased exposure from 460 to 1766 bets and reduced policy ROI from -5.14% to -8.02%. Its Top-4 ranking was better, so only a separately gated ranking challenger remains eligible for research.

gated_uniform_ranking.reason: With identical daily exposure to MetaFusion on the 730-day walk-forward, ROI was -11.52% versus -5.14%. Paired delta was -6.38%, CI95 [-23.06%, +10.27%], P(delta>0)=21.1%.

top_k_one_challenger.reason: On the 730-day walk-forward, gated Top-1 ROI was +3.12% with CI95 [-15.47%, +22.91%] and permutation p=0.4941. Ranking-only Top-1 ROI was +3.47% with CI95 [-10.09%, +17.53%]. Holdout policy remains locked at top_k=4.

top_k_sweep_2_3.reason: Top-2 and Top-3 did not outperform Top-1 and neither had a positive lower bootstrap bound. Production remains locked at top_k=4 until a pre-registered holdout comparison is available.

top_k_policy_change.evidence_note: Top-2 and Top-4 had nearly identical betting days; Top-2 reduced exposure and had less negative exploratory ROI. This is an operational risk-cap change, not an Edge Gate promotion.

target_semantics.economic_target: expected hit count per number per day
target_semantics.rule: Never use binary probability as expected hit count.

count_model_challenger.name: ewma_hl90_lcb
count_model_challenger.promotion_blocked_reason: Permutation test not significant, yearly CIs include zero, and candidate was selected after multiple comparisons.

pruned_models.reason: Candidate only: paired bootstrap CI95 for Pruned-fixed minus Full still includes zero; no production pruning.
